introSection: Jungle Squirrels (Chinese: 丛林飞鼠) is a steel roller coaster located at Chuanlord Holiday Manor in Shunde, Foshan, Guangdong, China. It was manufactured in November 2016 and replaced the Jungle Mouse.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single cars seating one or two people inline.

fullText:
Jungle Squirrels (Chinese: 丛林飞鼠) is a steel roller coaster located at Chuanlord Holiday Manor in Shunde, Foshan, Guangdong, China. It was manufactured in November 2016 and replaced the Jungle Mouse.



Single cars seating one or two people inline.
